falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish setup, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on a single day with a price surge >8%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a blowoff volume surge would suggest a market climax or panic selling, refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and indicating a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 2022 May Luna pattern's confirmed resistance level at 4,400 with a 20-day EMA crossover
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout above this key level would invalidate the pattern match and prove the current 'HOLD' signal is incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
